== Notes for [[Item:Q102502|Q102502]] ==

Migas is the son of Rabbi Yakob who descends from Mar Zutra II (Banu Tzilaba/Saluba).

Magis has two sons

1) Nehemiah, and

2) Yehudah (a/k/a "Natronai") - Gaon of Pumbeditha.
--------------------

[http://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90_%D7%91%D7%A8_%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90 '''מר זוטרא''' '''השלישי''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001926396261

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
